title: gentianella calcis subsp. calcis
intro: Gentianella calcis subsp. calcis, also known as the Calcic Gentianella or Alpine Gentianella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and flatulence. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as iridoids and gentiopicroside, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits including improved immune function and reduced inflammation. Gentianella calcis subsp. calcis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its digestive and anti-inflammatory effects.
